identityScript.coreTraits: The person behind all these domains: grounded, positive, present. The guy people feel better around — not performing, just being. Calm energy, real conversations, no front.

domains.label: Health
domains.actual: Hit planned gym sessions, run protein-first meals, prioritize sleep quality and emotional regulation during stress.
domains.becoming: 200 lbs with an athletic Olympic lifter build.

domains.label: Wealth
domains.actual: Prioritize AI fluency and minimum two deep-work blocks/day on high-leverage output. Keep compounding systems steady and tie major spending decisions to explicit long-term intent.
domains.becoming: Deep AI expertise applied to domains I love — entrepreneurship, markets, poker, meditation, and consciousness. Strengthen capital trajectory toward eight-figure optionality through focused, high-upside value creation.

domains.label: Love
domains.actual: Reduce isolation with deliberate weekly social contact. Pursue honest relationship clarity conversations.
domains.becoming: Active local community I'm embedded in. A partner with shared vision — growing together, becoming the best versions of ourselves.

domains.label: Self
domains.actual: Keep daily reflection/journaling and meditation active; protect sobriety streaks and interrupt urges immediately. Replace at least one zero-sum leisure loop with a positive-sum activity that creates energy and connection. TBD — score and define baseline.
domains.becoming: Calm, resilient, self-aware — understanding my own tendencies through meditation and AI. Consistently curious — reading, exploring, never stagnant. 3 years clean from weed, alcohol, and all substances. Have a full, chosen weekend life where home is restful by choice, not default isolation. Proximity to hobbies and community, access to nature, walkable.
